home.heroDescription: BIST · TEFAS · FX · commodities · bonds · crypto · VIOP. Hypothetical-lot positions, P&L converted to TRY at each day's actual rate, multi-year history.

security.title: Keycloak Authentication
security.description: Keycloak SSO with LDAP federation and TOTP 2FA. Passwords aren't stored in the app database.

marketData.title: Multi-Asset Market Data
marketData.description: Stocks, funds, FX, commodities, bonds, crypto and VIOP. Schedulers refresh on the TR market hours.

charting.title: TradingView Charts
charting.description: Built on Lightweight Charts — indicators, drawing tools, Fibonacci and compare mode.

portfolio.title: Hypothetical-Lot Portfolio
portfolio.description: Multi-position open/closed lots, realized & unrealized P&L in TRY, allocation donut, performance curve and daily snapshots.

ctaSection.heading: Create an account and try it.
ctaSection.body: Track stocks, funds, FX and more in one dashboard — build your portfolio and watch its performance live.

register.intro: Sign up for Finance Portal through Keycloak with email verification.

login.intro: Sign in to access Finance Portal.

positions.emptyHint: Add lots from Crypto, Stock, Forex or Fund pages
positions.realReturnTooltip: Inflation-adjusted return (purchasing power). A positive nominal gain can still be a negative real return when it trails inflation — your money grew but its buying power fell. Computed for spot holdings only; leveraged derivatives (VİOP) are excluded from the real return.

search.title: Add Position

marketOverview.title: Market Overview

descriptions.policyRate: CBRT one-week repo rate — main monetary policy rate
descriptions.tlrefRate: Turkish Lira Overnight Reference Rate — short-term interbank rate
descriptions.tlrefIndex: Compound index of TLREF — measures cumulative return
descriptions.cpiIndex: Consumer Price Index — change in household basket prices
descriptions.ppiIndex: Domestic Producer Price Index — change in producer-level prices
descriptions.depositTryTotal: Average TRY time deposit rate across banks
descriptions.depositUsdTotal: Average USD time deposit rate across banks
descriptions.depositEurTotal: Average EUR time deposit rate across banks
descriptions.depositTry1m: TRY deposit average rate, 1 month maturity

descriptions.depositTry6m: TRY deposit average rate, 6 month maturity

descriptions.depositUsd1m: USD deposit average rate, 1 month maturity

descriptions.depositEur1m: EUR deposit average rate, 1 month maturity

twoFactor.descActive: Your account is protected with two-factor authentication. Use the options below to re-set up or disable.
twoFactor.descInactive: Protect your account with an extra layer using Google/Microsoft Authenticator.
twoFactor.footerActive: If you disable, single-factor sign-in is active and account security drops.
twoFactor.footerInactive: You will be redirected to the verification setup page.
twoFactor.redirectingHint: You will be taken to the authenticator setup page
twoFactor.disabledBody: Two-factor authentication has been removed from your account

confirm.title: Disable 2FA?
confirm.message: Your account will be protected by single-factor sign-in. This is reversible — you can set it up again any time.

twoFactor.deviceRemovedBody: Selected 2FA device has been removed from your account
twoFactor.deviceRemoveConfirmBody: {{name}} will be deleted from your 2FA devices. To use it again you must enroll it from scratch.

identity.title: Identity
identity.savedBody: Your new identity details have been saved
identity.usernameHint: 3-32 characters; letters, digits, dot, underscore or hyphen.

error.title: {{label}} update failed
error.body: An error occurred during the operation

landing.title: Finance Portal
landing.subtitle: Welcome — a few quick settings and you're set.

onboarding.welcomeSubtitle: A finance dashboard combining market data, portfolio tracking and notifications in one interface.
onboarding.dismissHint: You won't see this window again — manage all options from Settings.

preferences.title: Make it yours
preferences.subtitle: Pick your theme and language now — you can change them anytime.

welcome.title: All markets in one place
welcome.desc: Track stocks, crypto, funds, forex, commodities and bonds from a single interface. Let's take a short tour together — press ESC to exit anytime.

marketTabs.title: Market tabs
marketTabs.desc: Overview shows featured assets, Rates lists forex and commodity prices, Indicators covers indices and macro data, Bank Rates compares deposit yields.

marketSearch.title: One search box
marketSearch.desc: Type a symbol or full name for stocks, crypto, funds, forex, commodities or derivatives, pick a suggestion from the autocomplete list or press Enter to open detail.

widgetEdit.title: Customise the home page
widgetEdit.desc: Open edit mode from the top right, drag and drop widgets to reorder them, add or remove tiles; build multiple pages and save each layout permanently for next time.

detailChart.title: Detail chart and drawings
detailChart.desc: Pick a timeframe from 1M to MAX, switch between candle, line or area. Use Trendline, Fibonacci and other drawing tools — your drawings are saved.

chartDrawing.title: Draw on the chart
chartDrawing.desc: Sketch direction with trendlines, mark retracement levels using Fibonacci, and add parallel channels or horizontal support and resistance lines.

fundDetail.title: Fund detail card
fundDetail.desc: For mixed and diversified funds like ACD - İSTANBUL PORTFÖY İKİNCİ DEĞİŞKEN FON you see allocation, period returns, risk level, category and the KAP link in one view.

fundAllocation.title: Allocation pie chart
fundAllocation.desc: Donut chart showing the fund's class-level weights — hover a slice to see the percentage and class name in the center, the matching row in the legend highlights too.

bondDetail.title: Bonds and bills
bondDetail.desc: Browse fixed-coupon government bonds, sukuk lease certificates and floating-rate bonds in the list; open one for full coupon history, maturity date and issue details.

bondDetailPage.title: Bond detail page
bondDetailPage.desc: Base price, coupon rate, simple yield, maturity date and the next coupon payment all live on this card, with the price history chart on top.

bondCoupon.title: Coupon rate chart
bondCoupon.desc: The coupon rate has its own chart below the price one — toggle it open or closed from the section header; it opens by default.

news.title: Market news
news.desc: Filter RSS-sourced headlines by Borsa İstanbul, Crypto and General Finance categories so you can jump straight to the stories that matter to you.

analyticsScenario.title: Compare scenarios
analyticsScenario.desc: Place different assets or portfolios side by side over the historical window you choose and inspect return and volatility gaps from here.

analyticsBeater.title: Inflation Beaters
analyticsBeater.desc: Automatically detect assets that outpaced TÜFE in the period you pick and list those delivering real returns against inflation from this panel.

portfolio.title: Build your portfolio
portfolio.desc: No portfolio yet? Create one from here. Already have one? Pick a stock, fund or crypto from the search and add backdated lot-based positions with entry date and price.

portfolioPdf.title: Download portfolio as PDF
portfolioPdf.desc: Allocation pie chart, time-series performance chart, realised profit-and-loss breakdown and the full open position list are packaged into one PDF in your chosen theme and language.

watchlist.title: Watchlists and alerts
watchlist.desc: Create multiple lists, set an above and below price threshold on each row to trigger email alerts when crossed, and drag and drop rows to reorder them as you wish.

customLists.title: Custom lists
customLists.desc: Use the new list shortcut to build themed collections like Short Term, Risky or Dividend; set a price threshold on any row to trigger an email when crossed.

notifications.title: Notification center
notifications.desc: Tap the bell to see the last 20 notifications with unread/all tabs; in-app and email run as separate channels, with per-category preferences (price, macro, news, portfolio) managed in settings.

settings.title: Settings panel
settings.desc: Pick theme, language, default chart range (1M/3M/1Y/MAX), display currency (TRY/USD/EUR) and time zone; toggle notifications per category (price, macro, news, portfolio) by email and in-app separately.

profile.title: Profile panel
profile.desc: Update name and email (old and new address verified by code), change password via Keycloak, set up TOTP 2FA with QR and recovery codes, and review or revoke active device sessions.

outro.title: Tour complete
outro.desc: Every preference can be changed anytime from the top-right menu. Happy investing.

farewell.title: Welcome aboard
farewell.subtitle: Happy investing — we're with you every step of the way.

summary.title: You're ready
summary.desc: You've seen markets, portfolio, watchlists and notifications. Every preference can be revisited from the settings and profile panels at any time.
summary.closing: That's it — you can start using the platform comfortably now.

marketRates.title: Rates
marketRates.desc: Forex pairs like USD/EUR/GBP, gold and silver commodities, CBRT effective rates and bank deposit yields can all be monitored in a single daily-update screen.

marketMacro.title: Indicators
marketMacro.desc: CPI, PPI, policy rate, TLREF, average deposit rates together with BIST 100 and BIST 30 index levels and yearly changes — every macro figure at a single glance.

marketReturns.title: Returns
marketReturns.desc: Ranks the realized returns of stocks, crypto, forex, funds and commodities over a chosen period — compare the best-performing assets in TRY, USD and EUR on a single screen.

multiMarket.title: Multi Market
multiMarket.body: Stock, crypto, commodity, fund, forex, bond in one place

watchlistItemEdit.title: Edit asset settings
watchlistItemEdit.thresholdHint: Leave blank to use global default. 0 = every movement triggers a notification.

errors.quantityInteger: This asset requires a whole-number quantity
errors.exitBeforeEntry: Exit date cannot be before entry date

newsSourceAdmin.missingBody: Source name and URL are required
newsSourceAdmin.deletePromptBody: This news source will be permanently removed.

trackedAssetAdmin.heading: {{title}} tracked list ({{prefix}}{{count}})
trackedAssetAdmin.deletePromptBody: This asset will be removed from the tracked list. Existing market data (candles, snapshots) is preserved.

addPriceAlert.title: Price alert
addPriceAlert.subtitlePrompt: Pick an asset and set a threshold
addPriceAlert.errorThreshold: Threshold must be a valid number
addPriceAlert.errorReference: Percent alert requires a reference price

ABOVE.label: Crosses above
ABOVE.hint: Notify when price moves above the threshold

BELOW.label: Drops below
BELOW.hint: Notify when price drops below the threshold

CHANGE_PCT_UP.label: % rises
CHANGE_PCT_UP.hint: Notify when price rises by the given % from reference

CHANGE_PCT_DOWN.label: % drops
CHANGE_PCT_DOWN.hint: Notify when price drops by the given % from reference

addWatchlistItem.subtitlePrompt: Pick an asset, then add it to a list
addWatchlistItem.thresholdHint: Leave blank to use the global 5% threshold.
addWatchlistItem.duplicateWarn: {{code}} already exists in this list. Saving will overwrite its note and threshold.
addWatchlistItem.errorThreshold: % threshold must be a positive number

priceAlertEdit.title: Edit alert settings
priceAlertEdit.thresholdHint: TRY price for ABOVE/BELOW, percent value for % directions.

createWatchlist.title: New list
createWatchlist.subtitle: You can create up to 20 lists

emptyList.title: List is empty
emptyList.hint: Add a crypto, stock, forex or fund and track its movements here.

emptyAlerts.title: No alerts yet
emptyAlerts.hint: Set ABOVE/BELOW or percent-change alerts on any asset.

deleteListConfirm.title: Delete list?
deleteListConfirm.message: "{{name}}" and all assets inside will be permanently deleted.

news.title: Financial News
news.subtitle: Latest market and finance news
news.sourceLanguageNote: Articles are published in Turkish as they are pulled directly from the source.
news.emptyCategory: No news in this category yet.

marketChips.title: Which markets
marketChips.footer: // unmarked markets do not skip opening / data notifications

emailChange.sendHintAfter: ; once you enter it below the new address becomes active.

toast.sameAddressDesc: New email cannot match the current address
toast.codeSentDesc: A 6-digit confirmation code was sent to {{email}}

analytics.amountHint: You can change the display currency in settings
analytics.beaterSubtitle: Instruments that outperform your chosen benchmark — CPI, policy rate, USD/EUR deposits, or any other indicator.
analytics.compareEmpty: Search and pick instruments below to compare.
analytics.compareSearchAssets: Search stocks, crypto, funds, FX, commodities, bonds…
analytics.portfolioSeriesHint: Portfolio line is cumulative return (%, from 0%); ₺ P&L in tooltip
analytics.compareSubtitle: Place different assets side-by-side on the same chart. No amount or date — just historical price movements.
analytics.excessReturnTooltip: Nominal return − Benchmark return (positive means beats benchmark)
analytics.noInstruments: No instruments selected. Add one below or pick from quick suggestions.
analytics.normalizedHintCompare: Each series indexed to 100,000 at the start (what 100,000 invested would be worth today)
analytics.normalizedHintCompareIndex: Macro series — indexed to 100 at start
analytics.levelHintCompare: Showing rate level — switch to "Cumulative" for cumulative growth
analytics.partialHint: Data does not fully span the selected window — partial, not directly comparable
analytics.scenarioSubtitle: If you had placed a given amount on a given date into different instruments, how much would it be today? Simulated against real historical data.
analytics.searchHint: Search stocks, funds, FX, crypto, commodities, macro

compareInfo.forwardFilledTooltip: Extended to today from the last data point
compareInfo.backfilledTooltip: Extended with the last known value at the start of the range

returns.title: Asset Returns
returns.subtitle: Return ranking of spot assets over the selected window — bonds and VIOP excluded.
returns.tryOnly: All returns are TRY-based — the display currency doesn't affect them
returns.currencyHint: Returns are shown in your chosen currency; each date is converted at its own day's FX rate. It starts from your global currency preference and you can change it freely here.
returns.preparing: Returns are being prepared — market data is loading, ready shortly.
returns.riskInfo: Annualized volatility — std. dev. of daily returns in the selected window × √252. Low <25% · Medium 25–55% · High >55%.
returns.usageHint: Click a metric chip to sort, click it again to flip direction (↑/↓). Narrow with the Type and Risk chips. Risk = how much the price swings — annualized volatility (σ): low < 25%, medium 25–55%, high > 55%.
returns.partialHint: The asset's history doesn't reach the start of this window — shorter span
returns.riskAdjustedInfo: Return ÷ volatility — high return for low risk rises to the top.

report.subtitle: Snapshot view of your portfolio composition and performance
report.footer: This report is generated automatically by Finance Portal. Values reflect snapshot data at generation time and do not constitute financial advice.
